case_title: A.M.A. DENTAL POWER OF S.F. INC. VS. BRETT HOFMANN DR

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PURSUANT TO THE CONTRACT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, THIS MATTER MUST GO THROUGH ARBITRATION BEFORE THE MATTER CAN GO TO SMALL CLAIMS.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF A.M.A DENTAL POWER OF S.F., INC. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRETT HOFFMAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. COURT DISMISSES THE MATTER WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PURSUANT TO THE CONTRACT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, THIS MATTER MUST GO THROUGH ARBITRATION BEFORE THE MATTER CAN GO TO SMALL CLAIMS. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $75.00) - SERVED AUG-04-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HOFMANN DR, BRETT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ALINE S. SALGUERO, PRESIDENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF A.M.A. DENTAL POWER OF S.F. INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY A.M.A. DENTAL POWER OF S.F. INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HOFMANN DR, BRETT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
